conference.name: VAD Bangkok 2026
conference.tagline: 4 High-Conviction Ideas for the Next Cycle

companies.name: F88 Investment
companies.thesis: F88 is Vietnam's leading consumer lending chain with over 800 branches nationwide, targeting the underbanked segment. Rising financial inclusion, strong loan book growth, and improving credit scoring capabilities position F88 to sustain above-sector ROE as the formal lending market deepens.

companies.name: Gemadept Corporation
companies.thesis: Gemadept is Vietnam's premier port and logistics operator, uniquely positioned to capture surging export volumes driven by supply chain diversification away from China. The Nam Dinh Vu deep-water terminal expansion and growing cold-chain logistics segment provide visible earnings growth through 2027.

companies.name: Bluemarq Group
companies.thesis: Dat Xanh is a diversified real estate developer with strong mid-market residential exposure in Ho Chi Minh City and the southern provinces. Legal clearances on key projects, improving mortgage market conditions, and a recovering property cycle position DXG for a meaningful earnings re-rating over the next 12–18 months.
risks: Policy risk on real estate credit

companies.name: Masan Consumer Holdings
companies.thesis: Masan Consumer is Vietnam's dominant branded food and beverage company with unmatched distribution across 180,000+ points of sale. Premiumisation of the product portfolio, strong brand loyalty in seasonings and instant noodles, and digital retail penetration support a durable 15–18% earnings CAGR through the cycle.
